items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.raw_content: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI的GPT模型、Codex和Managed Agents现已在AWS上可用，使企业能够在AWS环境中构建安全的AI应用。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.raw_content: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI 介绍其在ChatGPT中通过模型防护、滥用检测、政策执行以及与安全专家合作来保护社区安全的措施。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.raw_content: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI 与微软宣布修订合作协议，简化合作关系，增加长期清晰度，并支持持续的大规模AI创新。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.raw_content: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI 获得FedRAMP Moderate授权，ChatGPT Enterprise和OpenAI API可用于美国联邦机构，支持安全的AI采用。

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.raw_content: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.ai_summary: Symphony是一个开源规范，用于Codex编排，将问题追踪器转变为始终在线的智能体系统，提高工程产出并减少上下文切换。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.raw_content: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.ai_summary: Choco使用OpenAI API自动化食品配送流程，提高生产力并实现增长，这是一个展示AI实际影响的客户案例。

items.title: Our principles
items.raw_content: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI的使命是确保AGI惠及全人类，Sam Altman分享了指导工作的五条原则。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.raw_content: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI推出GPT-5.5，这是其最智能的模型，速度更快、能力更强，面向编程、研究和数据分析等复杂任务。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.raw_content: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
items.ai_summary: 探索GPT-5.5生物漏洞赏金计划：一项旨在发现生物安全风险通用越狱的红队挑战，奖励高达25000美元。

items.title: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
items.raw_content: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.
items.ai_summary: 探索10个Codex实际用例，涵盖自动化任务、创建交付物以及跨工具、文件和工作流程将真实输入转化为输出。
